title: The CP9 Matchups Are Set
description: The battle spreads across the Tower of Justice as the crew searches for the key that can free Robin from her cuffs.
scene: Across pages 9, 10, 11, 12, this part follows Luffy, Zoro, Nami, Rob Lucci, Sanji. The battle spreads across the Tower of Justice as the crew searches for the key that can free Robin from her cuffs.

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: to fulfill the wishes of the designer.

dialogue.speaker: Rob Lucci
dialogue.text: Bastard!! What the heck did you do!!?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: So I'll place my bet on them!!!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Sodom and gomorrah tried their best, too!!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Bro, we've come to rescue you!!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: We came with StrawhatSan and Them!!!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Damn you, who the heck asked you...

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: AZKD JOO TEH COME WESQUE MEEEEE!!?

summary: The battle spreads across the Tower of Justice as the crew searches for the key that can free Robin from her cuffs.
